title: S.O.S. Iceberg
writer: Arnold Fanck, Tom Reed, Edwin H. Knopf
actors: Rod La Rocque, Leni Riefenstahl, Sepp Rist
plot: In a departure from the trademark Alpine settings of Arnold Fanck's Bergfilme ("Mountain Films"), S.O.S. ICEBERG (S.O.S. EISBERG) takes place off the coast of Greenland, where an explorer, Karl Lorenz (Gustav Diessl), is stranded ...
